title: Stir Fry with Savory Tomato Sauce
description: A quick and easy stir fry dish made with fresh tomatoes and served over steaming hot Kenyar.
instructions: Marinate the Kenyar in 1 tablespoon of savory for 15 minutes.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped tomatoes and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add the halved grapes and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Add the marinated Kenyar to the skillet or wok and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over steaming hot Kenyar.
